---
title: "Hai-lights"
listing:
  contents: .
  sort:
    - "date desc"
    - "title desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
page-layout: full
body-classes: hailights-page
format:
  html:
    css: ../styles.css
    title-block-banner: true
---

```{=html}
<div class="hailights-banner-logo-wrap">
  <img class="hailights-banner-logo" src="../images/hai-lights-contact-logo-transparent.png" alt="Hai-lights logo" />
</div>
```

Hai-lights covers a range of industry topics and personal observations.

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const categoryMap = {
    "news": "News",
    "introduction": "Introduction",
    "ai exploration": "AI Exploration",
    "verification": "Verification"
  };

  const logoWrap = document.querySelector(".hailights-banner-logo-wrap");
  const listing = document.querySelector(".quarto-listing");
  const footer = document.querySelector("footer.footer");
  const mainContent = document.querySelector("main#quarto-document-content");
  const postCount = document.querySelectorAll(".quarto-post").length;
  const placeLogo = function () {
    if (!logoWrap) {
      return;
    }

    const viewportWidth = window.innerWidth;
    const isSinglePost = postCount <= 1;

    if (!isSinglePost && viewportWidth < 992 && listing && listing.parentNode) {
      listing.parentNode.insertBefore(logoWrap, listing.nextSibling);
      const oldEndcap = document.querySelector(".hailights-page-endcap");
      if (oldEndcap && oldEndcap.childElementCount === 0) {
        oldEndcap.remove();
      }
      return;
    }

    if (footer && footer.parentNode) {
      let endcap = document.querySelector(".hailights-page-endcap");
      if (!endcap) {
        endcap = document.createElement("div");
        endcap.className = "hailights-page-endcap";
        footer.parentNode.insertBefore(endcap, footer);
      }
      endcap.appendChild(logoWrap);
      return;
    }

    if (mainContent) {
      mainContent.appendChild(logoWrap);
    }
  };

  const syncShortPageLayout = function () {
    if (!logoWrap || !footer) {
      return;
    }

    document.body.classList.remove("hailights-short-page");
    const footerHeight = footer.offsetHeight || 0;
    const logoHeight = logoWrap.offsetHeight || 0;

    document.body.style.setProperty("--hailights-footer-height", footerHeight + "px");
    document.body.style.setProperty("--hailights-logo-height", logoHeight + "px");

    document.body.classList.toggle("hailights-single-post", postCount <= 1);
  };

  placeLogo();
  syncShortPageLayout();
  requestAnimationFrame(function () {
    placeLogo();
    syncShortPageLayout();
  });
  window.addEventListener("load", function () {
    placeLogo();
    syncShortPageLayout();
  });
  window.addEventListener("resize", function () {
    placeLogo();
    syncShortPageLayout();
  });

  document.querySelectorAll(".quarto-listing-category .category, .listing-category").forEach(function (el) {
    const text = el.childNodes[0] && el.childNodes[0].nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE
      ? el.childNodes[0].nodeValue.trim()
      : el.textContent.trim();
    const normalized = text.toLowerCase();
    if (categoryMap[normalized]) {
      if (el.childNodes[0] && el.childNodes[0].nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) {
        el.childNodes[0].nodeValue = categoryMap[normalized] + " ";
      } else {
        el.textContent = categoryMap[normalized];
      }
    }
  });
});
</script>
```
